subject: A clockwork gnome automaton — a small mechanical servant constructed of bronze and brass plating with exposed gears at the joints, glowing pale eyes, and a sculpted mustachioed face. Stands forward-facing in a stone corridor.
description: A small clockwork construct rendered as a mechanical gnome stands centered in a dim stone corridor. Its body is built from riveted bronze and brass plates with visible cogs and gear-work exposed at the shoulders and torso. The face is a sculpted metal mask with a pronounced mustache and two glowing pale-yellow eyes. The figure is upright and forward-facing, arms held at its sides. Behind it, a vaulted stone hallway recedes into shadow, with cool blue ambient light suggesting nighttime in a castle interior. The overall palette is dominated by warm metallic browns against cool blue stonework.
foreground: bronze and brass clockwork gnome construct with exposed gears and glowing eyes
background: vaulted stone castle corridor receding into shadow under cool ambient light
emotion: blank, dutiful, mechanically attentive — the still readiness of a servant on standby
